text: Both Bitcoin and Ethereum are down modestly over the past day in a broadly red market, with altcoins showing slightly larger losses, signaling mild selling pressure across the board. The Fear & Greed index sits in extreme fear territory at 15—though up 3 points over the week—suggesting capitulation sentiment without panic acceleration. Bitcoin's dominance at 56% and $88B in daily volume indicate that while risk-off conditions are present, neither a major exodus nor a liquidity crisis is underway.
